canonical_definition: Engaging in a sequential decision-making process to selectively ask about additional symptoms to accumulate diagnostic evidence.

definitions.text: Engaging in a sequential decision-making process to selectively ask about additional symptoms to accumulate diagnostic evidence.
Asking follow-up questions to elicit missing symptoms, history, or other diagnostic details from the patient.
